mapper.sql: select mr.record_id, mr.encounter_id, e.patient_id, e.doctor_id, mr.chief_complaint, mr.present_illness, mr.past_history, mr.allergy_history, mr.physical_exam, mr.diagnosis_opinion, mr.treatment_plan, mr.doctor_advice, mr.create_time, mr.update_time, d.doctor_name, sd.dept_name, e.encounter_type, e.visit_time from medical_record mr left join encounter e on e.encounter_id = mr.encounter_id left join doctor d on d.doctor_id = e.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = e.dept_id
mapper.select: select mr.record_id, mr.encounter_id, e.patient_id, e.doctor_id, mr.chief_complaint, mr.present_illness, mr.past_history, mr.allergy_history, mr.physical_exam, mr.diagnosis_opinion, mr.treatment_plan, mr.doctor_advice, mr.create_time, mr.update_time, d.doctor_name, sd.dept_name, e.encounter_type, e.visit_time from medical_record mr left join encounter e on e.encounter_id = mr.encounter_id left join doctor d on d.doctor_id = e.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = e.dept_id where mr.record_id = #{recordId}
select e.doctor_id from medical_record mr left join encounter e on e.encounter_id = mr.encounter_id where mr.encounter_id = #{encounterId} limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into medical_record
encounter_id, chief_complaint, present_illness, past_history, allergy_history, physical_exam, diagnosis_opinion, treatment_plan, doctor_advice, create_time, update_time,
#{encounterId}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{presentIllness}, #{pastHistory}, #{allergyHistory}, #{physicalExam}, #{diagnosisOpinion}, #{treatmentPlan}, #{doctorAdvice}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from medical_record where record_id in
#{recordId}
